Connector / no-solder detail: USB-C preassembled; castellated 14-pin; onboard PDM mic + IMU on Sense variant
Notes: Primary v2 board. nRF52840 = direct evolution of micro:bit v2 nRF52833. BLE 5.x + onboard LiPo charger. Non-Sense XIAO nRF52840 is fine when an external mic or phone-only audio is used.

Recommended 2026 example: Adafruit DRV2605L Haptic Motor Controller (PID 2305) or generic STEMMA QT clone
Connector / no-solder detail: JST-SH STEMMA QT in/out + 2-pin screw terminal or JST to actuator
Notes: Drives one LRA with onboard waveform ROM. Add a second module + I2C address change (open ADDR jumper) or a TCA9548A for >1 driver.
Needed only when running >2 DRV2605L modules with conflicting addresses.

Recommended 2026 example: Precision Microdrives C10-100 LRA with JST-PH lead or Jinlong G1040003D
Notes: 2 LRAs = comfortable daily wear; 4 LRAs = richer spatial cue. Sandwich between XIAO and lid; thermal pad against case wall.

Recommended 2026 example: LP502535 (~400 mAh) or LP402535 (~300 mAh) with JST-PH
Notes: Use protected cells only. 502535 fits the default 35x25x5.2 mm pocket. Charged via XIAO USB-C or magnetic pogo dock.

Recommended 2026 example: Adafruit magnetic pogo connector pair (PID 5358) or 4-pin keyed magnetic pogo
Notes: Magnetic pogo on case underside; dock side wires to any USB-C 5 V source. Keyed polarity required.
XIAO -> DRV2605L (use a Qwiic-to-castellated breakout or solder 4 wires once; v2 starter target keeps it no-solder via a XIAO expansion board).

Part: Seeed Studio Expansion Board Base for XIAO (Grove + battery JST)
Qty per build: Grove I2C + JST 2-pin battery; XIAO clicks in
Approx unit GBP May 2026: Provides Grove I2C to a Grove-to-STEMMA QT cable
Notes: plus JST-PH battery socket. Lets a beginner build the whole device with zero soldering.
Bridges XIAO expansion Grove to DRV2605L STEMMA QT.
Only needed when XIAO Sense onboard PDM mic is used through the lid vent.

Recommended 2026 example: M1.6 brass heat-set inserts or nylon M1.6 screws
Notes: Default v2 uses snap-fit lid only; screws are optional for sport use.

Recommended 2026 example: Any community parametric Apple-Watch-Ultra-style TPU/silicone band from Printables/MakerWorld
Connector / no-solder detail: Standard 20 mm or 22 mm spring bars
Notes: Drop-in. Recommend printing a TPU 95A band from a CC-licensed community design.
Used for integrated_tpu strap_style or printed bands.
